name: rapp
description: The species root — the prototype digital organism. Every RAPP-descended organism (variants, AI organisms, twins, swarms, customer estates, future androids/clouds/hybrids) traces parent_rappid back to this rappid. There is one rappid format, one species tree, one godfather. See pages/vault/Architecture/Rappid.md and CONSTITUTION.md Article XXXIV.
_legacy_uuid_note: The current 64-hex tail is the tagged RAPP/1 upgrade hash sha256(b'rapp/1:rappid\n' || UUIDv4_octets) for legacy UUID 0b635450-c042-49fb-b4b1-bdb571044dec; it is not the UUID with dashes removed. The historical values above record migration evidence only and do not authorize the re-anchor. Owner-signed section 13.3 authorization remains required.
_attestation_note: When a variant master is created from this rappid, the variant's rappid.json carries an `attestation` envelope signed by THIS rappid's release key, asserting the parent_rappid + parent_commit it forked from. The species root itself has no parent, so `attestation` is null. See pages/vault/Architecture/Signed Releases and Variant Attestation.md.
